name: Pumpkin Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pot or kettle until warm.
2. Add cardamom pod and cumin seeds; cook until seeds crackle.
3. Add onions, garlic, and powders; sauté until onions are browned.
4. Add cut pumpkin and water to cover by no more than an inch.
5. Cover and simmer until pumpkin is tender.
6. Mash or puree the soup in batches if desired.
7. Return to pot and add your choice of vegetables.
8. Cook until desired tenderness. Additional broth can be added for moisture, if needed.
9. Greens may be substituted with acorn or butternut squash.
